query:
CREATE TABLE `app_settings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`key` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`value` text,
	`type` enum('string','boolean','number','json') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'string',
	`label` varchar(200),
	`description` text,
	`category` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'general',
	`updatedBy` int,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `app_settings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `app_settings_key_unique` UNIQUE(`key`)
);

CREATE TABLE `user_sessions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`ipAddress` varchar(45),
	`userAgent` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`lastActiveAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	CONSTRAINT `user_sessions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

INSERT INTO `app_settings` (`key`, `value`, `type`, `label`, `description`, `category`) VALUES
  ('app_name', 'GetSales4Now', 'string', 'Application Name', 'The name displayed across the platform', 'general'),
  ('app_tagline', 'Digital Marketing & Sales Automation', 'string', 'App Tagline', 'Subtitle shown on landing page and emails', 'general'),
  ('default_language', 'en', 'string', 'Default Language', 'Default UI language for new users (en, es, pt)', 'general'),
  ('default_timezone', 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'string', 'Default Timezone', 'Default timezone for new accounts', 'general'),
  ('maintenance_mode', 'false', 'boolean', 'Maintenance Mode', 'When enabled, non-admin users see a maintenance page', 'system'),
  ('allow_new_registrations', 'true', 'boolean', 'Allow New Registrations', 'Toggle to open or close new user sign-ups', 'system'),
  ('max_contacts_per_user', '5000', 'number', 'Max Contacts per User', 'Maximum number of contacts a single user can create', 'limits'),
  ('max_campaigns_per_user', '50', 'number', 'Max Campaigns per User', 'Maximum active campaigns per user account', 'limits'),
  ('ai_daily_limit', '100', 'number', 'AI Requests Daily Limit', 'Max AI requests per user per day', 'limits'),
  ('support_email', 'support@getsales4now.com', 'string', 'Support Email', 'Email shown to users for support requests', 'contact'),
  ('whatsapp_support', '', 'string', 'WhatsApp Support Number', 'WhatsApp number for user support', 'contact'),
  ('smtp_from_name', 'GetSales4Now', 'string', 'Email From Name', 'Sender name for transactional emails', 'email'),
  ('smtp_from_email', 'noreply@getsales4now.com', 'string', 'Email From Address', 'Sender address for transactional emails', 'email'),
  ('feature_social_media', 'true', 'boolean', 'Feature: Social Media', 'Enable or disable the Social Media module', 'features'),
  ('feature_ai_agents', 'true', 'boolean', 'Feature: AI Agents', 'Enable or disable the AI Copilots module', 'features'),
  ('feature_funnels', 'true', 'boolean', 'Feature: Funnels', 'Enable or disable the Funnels module', 'features'),
  ('feature_inbox', 'true', 'boolean', 'Feature: Inbox', 'Enable or disable the Omnichannel Inbox module', 'features'),
  ('analytics_enabled', 'true', 'boolean', 'Analytics Enabled', 'Enable platform-wide usage analytics', 'analytics'),
  ('session_timeout_hours', '24', 'number', 'Session Timeout (hours)', 'How long before user sessions expire', 'security'),
  ('require_2fa_admin', 'false', 'boolean', 'Require 2FA for Admins', 'Force two-factor authentication for admin accounts', 'security');

CREATE TABLE `user_sessions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,

	`ipAddress` varchar(45),
	`userAgent` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`lastActiveAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
